title: Cost Allowability, Processes & Support Documents — Special Workshop Slides (Manyara/Shine-Lee)
display_label: Cost Allowability Processes & Support Docs Slides (2022-12-09)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-12-09 Cost Allowability Special Workshop, fourth and closing presentation 'Cost Allowability, Processes & Support Documents' co-presented by Lucy Manyara, MBA and Shamon Shine-Lee. Walks through MSU's day-to-day processes and supporting documentation requirements for substantiating cost allowability on sponsored projects.
